name: CBPR_Priority_Instruction_Priority
description: If Priority is used in BAH, value must match InstructionPriority if present.
errorMessage: BAH Priority must match PaymentTypeInformation/InstructionPriority.
fix: Ensure AppHdr/Prty and Document/FICdtTrf/CdtTrfTxInf/PmtTpInf/InstrPrty have same value.

name: CBPR_From_To_BIC_Match_Non_Copy
description: BAH From/To BIC must match Instructing/Instructed Agent, except when CopyDuplicate=COPY or CODU.
condition: exists(AppHdr.Fr.FIId.FinInstnId.BICFI) and exists(AppHdr.To.FIId.FinInstnId.BICFI) and not exists(AppHdr.CpyDplct)
errorMessage: BAH From/To BICs must match Instructing/Instructed Agent BICs when CopyDuplicate not COPY/CODU.
fix: Align BAH From/To BICs with InstgAgt/InstdAgt BICs or set CopyDuplicate to COPY/CODU.

name: CBPR_From_To_BIC_Match_No_Copy
description: BAH From/To BIC must match Instructing/Instructed Agent when CopyDuplicate is absent.
condition: exists(AppHdr.Fr.FIId.FinInstnId.BICFI) and exists(AppHdr.To.FIId.FinInstnId.BICFI) and not exists(AppHdr.CpyDplct)
errorMessage: BAH From/To BICs must match when CopyDuplicate is absent.
fix: Align BAH From/To BICs with InstgAgt/InstdAgt BICs.

name: CBPR_Business_Service_Usage_COV
description: Business Service value must be 'swift.cbprplus.cov.03' for pacs.009 COV.
errorMessage: Business Service must be 'swift.cbprplus.cov.03' for pacs.009 COV.
fix: Set AppHdr/BizSvc to 'swift.cbprplus.cov.03'.

name: CBPR_Message_Definition_Identifier_COV
description: MsgDefIdr must be 'pacs.009.001.08' for pacs.009 COV messages.
errorMessage: AppHdr <MsgDefIdr> must be 'pacs.009.001.08' for pacs.009 COV messages.
fix: Set <MsgDefIdr>pacs.009.001.08</MsgDefIdr> in AppHdr.

name: CBPR_Remittance_Mutually_Exclusive
description: Either Structured or Unstructured Remittance can be present in underlying CstmrCdtTrf, not both.
expression: (exists(Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Undrlyg.CstmrCdtTrf.RmtInf.Strctd) and not exists(Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Undrlyg.CstmrCdtTrf.RmtInf.Ustrd)) or (not exists(Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Undrlyg.CstmrCdtTrf.RmtInf.Strctd) and exists(Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Undrlyg.CstmrCdtTrf.RmtInf.Ustrd)) or (not exists(Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Undrlyg.CstmrCdtTrf.RmtInf.Strctd) and not exists(Document.FICdtTrf.CdtTrfTxInf.Undrlyg.CstmrCdtTrf.RmtInf.Ustrd))
errorMessage: Remittance Information must have either Structured or Unstructured, not both.
fix: Remove either Structured or Unstructured Remittance.

name: CBPR_Instruction_For_Creditor_Code_Unique
description: Each InstructionForCreditorAgent code can only be used once.
errorMessage: InstructionForCreditorAgent code appears more than once.
fix: Ensure each code value appears only once in InstrForCdtrAgt.

name: CBPR_Instruction_Identification_Format
description: InstructionIdentification must not start/end with '/' or contain '//'.
errorMessage: InstructionIdentification has invalid format (starts/ends with / or contains //).
fix: Remove leading/trailing slashes and consecutive slashes.

name: CBPR_E2E_COV_Instruction
description: In pacs.009 COV, EndToEndId should transport the instruction identification of the underlying pacs.008.
errorMessage: E2E in pacs.009 COV should match underlying pacs.008 instruction ID.

name: CBPR_End_To_End_Identification_Format
description: EndToEndId: first and 16th char cannot be '/', no '//' in first 16 chars.
expression: not re.match(r'^/', str(VALUE)) and not re.match(r'^.{15}/', str(VALUE)) and not re.search(r'//', str(VALUE)[:16])
errorMessage: EndToEndIdentification violates format restrictions.
fix: Ensure first 16 chars: no leading /, no trailing /, no consecutive //.

name: CBPR_UETR_COV_Match
description: In pacs.009 COV, UETR should transport the UETR of the underlying pacs.008.
errorMessage: UETR in pacs.009 COV should match underlying pacs.008 UETR.

name: CBPR_Local_Instrument_Preference
description: LocalInstrument: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: LocalInstrument should use coded information (<Cd>).

name: CBPR_Category_Purpose_Preference
description: CategoryPurpose: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: CategoryPurpose should use coded information (<Cd>).

name: CBPR_Interbank_Settlement_Currency
description: InterbankSettlementAmount currency: XAU, XAG, XPD, XPT not allowed (commodity codes).
errorMessage: Commodity currencies (XAU, XAG, XPD, XPT) not allowed in InterbankSettlementAmount.
fix: Use only standard ISO 4217 currency codes.

name: CBPR_Agent_National_Only
description: When all agents are in the same country, clearing code alone may be used.
errorMessage: Agent (national): ClrSysMmbId alone is permitted when all agents are in the same country.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_1
description: Agent identification option 1 (preferred): BICFI, optionally complemented with LEI.
errorMessage: Agent Option 1 (preferred): use <BICFI>, optionally with <LEI>.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_2
description: Agent option 2: if ClrSysMmbId OR LEI is present (without BICFI), then both Nm AND PstlAdr must also be present.
expression: all((not (robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') or robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) and robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 2: when ClrSysMmbId or LEI is used (without BICFI), <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both be present.
fix: Add <Nm> and <PstlAdr> inside <FinInstnId> when using ClrSysMmbId or LEI without BICFI.

name: CBPR_Agent_Option_3
description: Agent option 3: if Nm is present (without BICFI, ClrSysMmbId, or LEI), PstlAdr must be present.
expression: all(not robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.Nm')) or robust_exists(k.replace('.FinInstnId', '.FinInstnId.PstlAdr')) for k in DATA.keys() if k.endswith('.FinInstnId') and not robust_exists(k + '.BICFI') and not robust_exists(k + '.ClrSysMmbId') and not robust_exists(k + '.LEI'))
errorMessage: Agent Option 3: when Nm is present without BICFI/ClrSysMmbId/LEI, a <PstlAdr> must also be present.
fix: Add <PstlAdr> with at least <TwnNm> and <Ctry> inside <FinInstnId> when using Name-only identification.

name: CBPR_PrvsInstgAgt1_Name_Address
description: PreviousInstructingAgent1: Name and Address must always be present together.
errorMessage: PreviousInstructingAgent1: <Nm> and <PstlAdr> must both exist or both be absent.
fix: Add both <Nm> and <PstlAdr>, or remove both.

name: CBPR_Purpose_Guideline
description: Purpose: coded information (Cd) is preferred over proprietary (Prtry).
errorMessage: Purpose should use coded information (<Cd>).

name: CBPR_UltimateDebtor_Jurisdictional
description: UltimateDebtor (Jurisdictional): Name and/or Id required for same jurisdiction transactions.
errorMessage: UltimateDebtor: Name and/or Identification required for jurisdictional transactions.

name: CBPR_UltimateDebtor_Option_1
description: UltimateDebtor Option 1: Name AND Structured/Hybrid Address (min TwnNm and Ctry).
errorMessage: UltimateDebtor should use Name + Address with TownName and Country.
fix: Provide <Nm> and <PstlAdr> with <TwnNm> and <Ctry> minimum.

name: CBPR_UltimateDebtor_Option_2
description: UltimateDebtor Option 2: Name AND Address AND (OrgId or PrvtId).
errorMessage: UltimateDebtor should use Name + Address + Identification.
fix: Provide <Nm>, <PstlAdr>, and <Id> with OrgId or PrvtId.

name: CBPR_UltimateDebtor_Name_Address
description: UltimateDebtor: If PostalAddress present, Name is mandatory.
errorMessage: UltimateDebtor: Name is mandatory when PostalAddress is present.
fix: Add <Nm> to UltimateDebtor.

name: CBPR_InitiatingParty_Name_Address
description: InitiatingParty: If PostalAddress present, Name is mandatory.
errorMessage: InitiatingParty: Name is mandatory when PostalAddress is present.
fix: Add <Nm> to InitiatingParty.

name: CBPR_Debtor_Name_BIC_Requirement
description: Debtor: If AnyBIC absent, Name is mandatory and Postal Address recommended.
errorMessage: Debtor: Name is mandatory when AnyBIC is absent.
fix: Add <Nm> to Debtor or provide AnyBIC in Identification.

name: CBPR_Debtor_Jurisdictional
description: Debtor (Jurisdictional): Name mandatory with AcctId OR Id for same jurisdiction.
errorMessage: Debtor: Name mandatory with Account or Identification for jurisdictional transactions.

name: CBPR_Debtor_Option_1
description: Debtor Option 1: OrgId/AnyBIC AND (Account OR OrgId/Othr).
errorMessage: Debtor Option 1: AnyBIC should be accompanied by Account or Other identification.
fix: Provide AnyBIC with either Account Number or Other identification.

name: CBPR_Debtor_Option_2
description: Debtor Option 2: Name AND Address AND (Account OR Id).
errorMessage: Debtor Option 2: Name + Address + (Account or Identification) expected.
fix: Provide <Nm>, <PstlAdr>, and either DbtrAcct or <Id>.

name: CBPR_Debtor_Name_Address_Postal
description: Debtor: If PostalAddress present, Name is mandatory.
errorMessage: Debtor: Name is mandatory when PostalAddress is present.
fix: Add <Nm> to Debtor.

name: CBPR_Debtor_AnyBIC_Exclusivity
description: Debtor: If AnyBIC present, Name and PostalAddress are NOT allowed.
errorMessage: Debtor: When AnyBIC is present, <Nm> and <PstlAdr> should not be used.
fix: Remove <Nm> and <PstlAdr> when AnyBIC is present.

name: CBPR_Creditor_Name_BIC_Requirement
description: Creditor: If AnyBIC absent, Name is mandatory and Postal Address recommended.
errorMessage: Creditor: Name is mandatory when AnyBIC is absent.
fix: Add <Nm> to Creditor or provide AnyBIC in Identification.

name: CBPR_Creditor_Jurisdictional
description: Creditor (Jurisdictional): Name mandatory with Account OR Id for same jurisdiction.
errorMessage: Creditor: Name mandatory with Account or Identification for jurisdictional transactions.

name: CBPR_Creditor_Option_1
description: Creditor Option 1: OrgId/AnyBIC AND (Account OR OrgId/Othr).
errorMessage: Creditor Option 1: AnyBIC should be accompanied by Account or Other identification.
fix: Provide AnyBIC with either Account Number or Other identification.

name: CBPR_Creditor_Option_2
description: Creditor Option 2: Name AND Address AND (Account OR Id).
errorMessage: Creditor Option 2: Name + Address + (Account or Identification) expected.
fix: Provide <Nm>, <PstlAdr>, and either CdtrAcct or <Id>.

name: CBPR_Creditor_Name_Address_Postal
description: Creditor: If PostalAddress present, Name is mandatory.
errorMessage: Creditor: Name is mandatory when PostalAddress is present.
fix: Add <Nm> to Creditor.

name: CBPR_Creditor_AnyBIC_Exclusivity
description: Creditor: If AnyBIC present, Name and PostalAddress are NOT allowed.
errorMessage: Creditor: When AnyBIC is present, <Nm> and <PstlAdr> should not be used.
fix: Remove <Nm> and <PstlAdr> when AnyBIC is present.

name: CBPR_UltimateCreditor_Option_1
description: UltimateCreditor Option 1: Name AND Structured Address (minimum Country).
errorMessage: UltimateCreditor Option 1: Name + Structured Address (minimum Country).
fix: Provide <Nm> and <PstlAdr> with at least <Ctry>.

name: CBPR_UltimateCreditor_Jurisdictional
description: UltimateCreditor (Jurisdictional): Name and/or Id for same jurisdiction.
errorMessage: UltimateCreditor: Name and/or Identification required for jurisdictional transactions.

name: CBPR_UltimateCreditor_Name_Address
description: UltimateCreditor: If PostalAddress present, Name is mandatory.
errorMessage: UltimateCreditor: Name is mandatory when PostalAddress is present.
fix: Add <Nm> to UltimateCreditor.

name: CBPR_RemittanceInformation_Usage
description: Structured Remittance: use must be bilaterally agreed; total content max 9000 chars.
errorMessage: Structured Remittance total content exceeds 9000 characters or bilateral agreement not documented.
